answer: Your timetable is under My Timetable — it only shows once your headteacher has published it. If it looks empty, it likely hasn't been published yet; ask your teacher.
You can view your results under Results — end-of-term, midterm, and class-test scores for your own subjects only.
Scan the QR code your teacher shows in class, or open the attendance link directly — no login needed. Select your name from the class list and it records automatically.
Career Guidance has two parts: Career pathways for career clusters and details, and the Guidance board for tips, bursaries, and events posted by your guidance teacher.
I can only help you navigate ZSMS, not with subject content. For study help, try Study Assistant or Flashcards in your dashboard, or ask your teacher.
Make sure you're on your school's own login page. If your password isn't accepted, use Forgot Password to reset it — a weak password will also block login until reset.
Study materials are posted by your teachers per subject — check Materials in your dashboard. If a specific subject's materials seem missing, that teacher may not have uploaded them yet.
ECZ Practice and Mock Exam are both under your dashboard for exam-style practice on your subjects.
